ingredientsDesc: Iron Sucrose is an aqueous sloution of ferric hydroxide in complex with sucrose. It contains not less than 3.5% and not more than 4.0% of iron,and not less than 45.0% and not more than 65.0% of sucrose(C12H22O11).The ratio of sucrose and iron is between 13.0-17.0.
